creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
Since I have to get this running I spent some time on it and have =
discovered that openssl is looking for the "makedepend" package.

(Strange since I never remember it doing that the last gazillion times =
I've done a portupgrade on openssl.)

Anyway. So it appears that makedepend is the one causing the problem =
(although I'm still not sure why openssl all of a sudden wants it to =
begin with).=
